title: 'A new norm': BBC visits Doha market starting to fill up again two weeks into Iran war
summary_full: The BBC's International News correspondent, Barbara Plett Usher, visits Doha's Souq Waqif market as strikes in the region continue.
summary_public: The BBC's International News correspondent, Barbara Plett Usher, visits Doha's Souq Waqif market as strikes in the region continue.
